user.title: Evolute
user.description: Enter the access_token and refresh_token cookie values from your browser after logging in at app.evassist.ru (DevTools → Application → Cookies → evy-platform-access / evy-platform-refresh).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Evolute
reauth_confirm.description: Your Evolute tokens have expired or were revoked. Log in to app.evassist.ru in your browser and paste the new evy-platform-access / evy-platform-refresh cookie values.

error.invalid_auth: Could not authenticate with the provided tokens
